creator: dkg@fifthhorseman.net
text:
anarcat hs graciously offered to take over the monkeysphere freebsd port.  I'm happy to put it in his capable paws, because i'm currently overloaded and haven't successfully made the time for it in a while.

If there are ways i can help out further, please let me know.  I'm happy to see the package being maintained in freebsd.
